svg.aria-label: Chapter 07 overview: SM_120 Warp Scheduler & Control — CGGTY flow, stall/SB, pipeline, divergence, RF/I-cache

g.text: CGGTY policy · stall/yield/scoreboard · 6-stage pipeline · divergence O(2^D) · RF & I-cache hierarchy
Fetch → Decode → Schedule → Operand Collect → Execute → Writeback
L1: 44 cyc · L2: 354 cyc · DRAM: 470+ cyc
Per-cycle: 1 instruction max · Context switch = 0 cyc · I-buffer ~4 entries/warp
Software trust ↔ HW interlock · two parallel paths · 41 bits/warp ctrl word
SM RF · 65,536 × 32-bit · OC absorbs 0-cyc bank conflict
Operand Collector · ≥3 read ports · bypass d=0..2
L1 I-Cache · ~64 KB / SM (shared by 4 SMSP)
